subparts.text: Define the term "water crisis" and mention two key contributing factors. 1
What are the various types of impurities found in water? Explain based on their category. 1
What is zero discharge, and how does it contribute to water conservation? 1
Explain the functioning of a low-flow fixture and its water-saving benefits. 2
Discuss the dry and wet zones in toilet design. 2
What is the significance of self-cleaning velocity in drainpipes? 2

questions.question_text: Design a water storage tank for the residential apartment building with G+7 story having four apartments on each floor. 1
Explain the properties, applications, and key differences between PVC, UPVC, and CPVC pipes. 1
Explain the working principle of EcoSAN toilet and its relevance to sustainable sanitation. 2
Compare the Single stack system, one-pipe and two-pipe systems of drainage with diagrams. 2
What is STP? Explain the process of water treatment in STP with the help of a diagram. 3
What are the various methods of water conservation? Explain in detail. 3
What does ETP stand for; How it can be integrated in planning layout while designing a farm house?? Explain with the help of a pdiagram.
Explain the working principle of a solar water heating system designed for residential buildings. Support your answer with a well-labeled diagram to illustrate the process.
